If the semiconductor rally loses steam, it's retail investors who could get hurt the most

holdings.infoBox: PSI is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Applied Materials stock at 6.09%, KLA Corporation at 5.75%, Lam Research at 5.58%, Micron Technology at 5.56%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 4.91%.

overview.description: The Invesco Semiconductors ETF (PSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks an index that uses a quantitative model to select and weight US semiconductor companies. PSI was launched on Jun 23, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Red-Hot Chip Stocks Are Lifting Tech ETFs. One ETF Has Doubled Since It Launched Last Month.
